name: Ultimate Player 🎬
description: Example player that uses ALL 17+ IDs and metadata from Little Racun. Perfect template for player developers!

kodi_properties_access.description: Players can also access metadata via Kodi properties
available_properties: imdb_id, tmdb_id, tvdb_id, mal_id, anilist_id, kitsu_id, anidb_id, trakt_id, tvmaze_id, simkl_id, slug_id, youtube_id, generic_id

infotag_access.description: Players can access full metadata via InfoTagVideo
infotag_access.example_python: video_info = list_item.getVideoInfoTag(); title = video_info.getTitle(); plot = video_info.getPlot(); rating = video_info.getRating()
available_methods: getTitle(), getPlot(), getYear(), getRating(), getSeason(), getEpisode(), getTVShowTitle(), getGenres(), getStudios(), getTvShowStatus()

usage_tips: 1. Use multiple ID types for better source finding
2. Prioritize IDs based on your source providers
3. Implement fallback logic (try imdb, then tmdb, then search)
4. Access Kodi properties for additional metadata
5. Use InfoTagVideo for rich user dialogs
